metadata.name: Rest in Peace redirects creature from graveyard to exile
metadata.description: p1 casts Rest in Peace, which registers a global replacement effect. p1 then casts Lightning Bolt targeting p2's Llanowar Elves (1/1). The Elves take 3 damage, SBA triggers, and the WouldChangeZone replacement redirects the Elves to exile instead of p2's graveyard. Asserts the Elves are NOT in p2's graveyard and NOT on the battlefield.
metadata.generation_notes: Tests the full cast-then-fire cycle for a global replacement effect. Rest in Peace enters via resolution.rs which calls register_permanent_replacement_abilities, registering a WouldChangeZone{to:Graveyard}->Exile replacement. Lightning Bolt kills the 1/1 Elves; the SBA zone-change interception applies the replacement and the Elves go to exile. No OrderReplacements needed (single replacement auto-applies per CR 616.1).

script.step_note: p1 casts Rest in Peace, then Lightning Bolt to trigger the replacement

actions.description: Initial: RiP + Lightning Bolt in p1 hand, Llanowar Elves on p2's side

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Rest in Peace for {1W}. Goes on the stack.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Rest in Peace resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.3a: Rest in Peace is a permanent — enters battlefield under p1's control. register_permanent_replacement_abilities fires, registering WouldChangeZone{to:Graveyard}->Exile.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Rest in Peace resolves and enters the battlefield, registering its replacement effect.

actions.description: After RiP resolves: Rest in Peace on p1's battlefield, 1 card in hand
actions.note: Rest in Peace is on the battlefield; its global replacement is now active.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Lightning Bolt targeting p2's Llanowar Elves (1/1).
CR 116.3: Both players pass — Lightning Bolt resolves.

resolution.note: CR 120.3: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to Llanowar Elves (1/1).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Lightning Bolt resolves; 3 damage assigned to the Elves.

results.description: Llanowar Elves has toughness 1, damage marked 3 — would die. CR 614.1a: Rest in Peace's replacement applies; Elves redirected to exile instead of graveyard.

actions.note: SBA: creature with lethal damage dies. Rest in Peace replacement (auto-applied per CR 616.1) redirects to exile.

actions.description: After SBA: Llanowar Elves in exile (not in graveyard, not on battlefield)
actions.note: CR 614.1a: Rest in Peace replacement fired; Elves went to exile, not graveyard.
